regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces April 22 ceasefire deadline with unprecedented US military escalation (10,000+ troops, 3 carrier strike groups, naval blockade turning back 14-23 vessels) and Israeli strikes targeting energy infrastructure and senior IRGC leadership since June 14-15, while the regime fractures between President Pezeshkian's diplomatic efforts and hardline IRGC control, with second-round ceasefire talks scheduled in Pakistan before deadline expiration and Iran's economy facing decade-long reconstruction amid hyperinflation and structural collapse.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Israeli strikes on June 15 killed IRGC Intelligence Chief Mohammad Kazemi and targeted energy infrastructure, judicial institutions, and internal security apparatus across eastern Iran including Mashhad airbase, while simultaneously US military escalation and naval blockade enforcement continues.
